title: How to build an AI Agent and MCP Server (step-by-step)
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to build AI agents using the Model Context Protocol (MCP), an open standard that enables agents to connect securely with live external data and tools. The tutorial covers MCP architecture, integration with Google Trends, and deployment using Google's Agent Development Kit.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building an AI agent and a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server step by step, covering MCP architecture and how the open standard lets agents connect securely to live external data and tools. The build integrates Google Trends as a data source and uses Google's Agent Development Kit for deployment. The practical takeaways: how MCP structures the connection between an agent and external tools, how to wire a live data source into that flow, and how the Agent Development Kit handles deployment.
